title: nidorella varia
intro: Nidorella varia, also known as the hairy daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nidorella varia include the treatment of fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and sore eyes. Nidorella varia can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and roots can also be used in tinctures and ointments for various medicinal purposes.
